# BP-107 positive variant: a differently named downstream handler is ignored.
lang: go
file: BP-107-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"log"
	"net/http"
)

func audit(downstream http.Handler) http.Handler {
	return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		log.Println(r.Method)
	})
}
